what_it_does: This file is a ledger attachment record that associates a board item with the dragnet-development channel as a board_items attachment, stamped with an added timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It declares id att-051217f5, channel dragnet-development, attachment_type board_items, and target board://item-e6f5e469.
standouts: The target is expressed as a board:// URI pointing to item-e6f5e469.
The attachment_type is board_items, indicating a channel-to-board linkage.
conventions: Follows a ledger attachment schema with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
References an external board item via a URI-style identifier.
notes: A minimal, timestamped channel attachment stub that points a board item at the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What is the content or purpose of board item item-e6f5e469?
Was this attachment created automatically or manually?
intention_signals: To create a durable, timestamped record that a specific board item is attached to the dragnet-development channel, supporting retrieval and audit.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item from a channel attachment.
contribution: Provides a precise, time-stamped association between a channel and a board item, enabling cross-referencing and provenance tracking without embedding the board content.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record identifying a board_items attachment (att-051217f5) targeting board item item-e6f5e469 in the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to record that a specific board item belongs to or was added to the dragnet-development channel at a known time.
